command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '员工'
ws['B1'] = '出勤天数'
ws['C1'] = '请假天数'
ws['D1'] = '迟到次数'
ws['A2'] = '吴明'
ws['B2'] = 22
ws['C2'] = 0
ws['D2'] = 1
ws['A3'] = '郑华'
ws['B3'] = 20
ws['C3'] = 2
ws['D3'] = 0
ws['A4'] = '冯亮'
ws['B4'] = 21
ws['C4'] = 1
ws['D4'] = 3
ws['A5'] = '秦雪'
ws['B5'] = 22
ws['C5'] = 0
ws['D5'] = 0
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/attendance.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 从/home/user/Desktop/attendance.xlsx中找到全勤且从未迟到的员工，在/home/user/Desktop/hr_report.txt末尾追加：'全勤无迟到：秦雪'，保存
